author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Root cause: topo_sort_issues and dedup_issue_files don't impose a stable ordering on issues without display_id. Iteration order comes from filesystem which is non-deterministic. When next_local_id always starts at -1, a re-hydration that reads files in a different order swaps local ID assignments. Fix: add stable tiebreaker (created_at then uuid) to topo_sort_issues so roots always appear in the same order across hydrations.
